soundindicators.config.title: Sound Indicators
soundindicators.config.enabled.tooltip: Master toggle. Turns the entire directional sound overlay on or off.
soundindicators.config.showFootsteps.too: Show an indicator whenever a nearby footstep sound is heard.
soundindicators.config.showProjectiles.t: Show an indicator whenever a projectile is fired or thrown nearby.
soundindicators.config.showBlockBreaks.t: Show an indicator whenever a block is broken nearby.
soundindicators.config.iconSize.tooltip: Size, in pixels, of the footstep/projectile icons.
soundindicators.config.circleDistance.to: Distance, in pixels, of the indicator ring from the crosshair.
soundindicators.config.circleOpacity.too: Opacity of the colored arc/ring, from 0% (invisible) to 100% (fully opaque).
soundindicators.config.circleColor.toolt: Hex color of the arc/ring, e.g. #FFA500. The leading # is optional.
soundindicators.config.circleColor.inval: Enter a valid hex color, e.g. #FFA500 or FFA500
soundindicators.config.arcWidth.tooltip: Angular width of each drawn arc segment. Overlapping arcs from multiple sounds stack into a full ring when you're surrounded.
soundindicators.config.displayDuration.t: How long, in milliseconds, an indicator stays on screen before disappearing.
soundindicators.config.fadeOut.tooltip: Whether indicators fade out smoothly over their lifetime, rather than disappearing instantly.
